title: WAVE product pricing profile
description: Per-product pricing.yaml. Five fields decide how a product is priced and settled for humans and agents. See frameworks/pricing/README.md.

product.description: Product/spoke slug, e.g. dispatch, srt, ndi, moq.

human_access.description: module = folded into the WAVE platform tiers as a feature+quota; standalone = its own tier ladder (only when economically distinct, e.g. dispatch).

agent_x402.description: Accountless per-use price exposed at /.well-known/x402. null when the product cannot serve autonomous agents.

unit.description: Canonical meter the per-use price is denominated in.

price_usd.description: USD per unit (settled as USDC-atomic over crypto rails).

meter.description: Canonical meter(s) this product bills. MUST exist in the registry (frameworks/pricing/README.md). No product-local twins.

economics.description: hosted = WAVE runs it and bills consumption (CAN fold into platform meters). control-plane = BYO infra/keys, WAVE bills only its service fee and never sees customer data (trust wall) — MUST stay its own surface.

rails.description: Settlement rails, via the WAVE universal delegate. Default opts into the full set; a product never integrates a rail itself.

grandfather.description: Optional: legacy pricing preserved during migration.

topology_meters.description: Optional: which canonical meters a given runtime TOPOLOGY profile activates. Generalizes dispatch's code_meters() (decisions always; ai_tokens only when the edge-exec topology is present). Keys are topology profile names; values are the canonical meters active in that profile. Lets the push job + reconcile derive the live meter set per deployment instead of hardcoding it.

platform_tiers.description: Optional: per-tier entitlements + quotas (resolves the #36 deferral). When a product folds into the WAVE platform tiers (human_access: module) it declares, per tier, the module flags it enables and its per-meter included quota; beyond quota = metered overage at the canonical rate. Overage MUST default to capped+alert (uncapped is opt-in).

modules.description: Module entitlement flags this tier unlocks for the product (e.g. {"ndi": true}).

quotas.description: Included per-meter quota for this tier (canonical meter → included units/mo). Beyond this = metered overage.

overage.description: Overage posture. MUST default to capped+alert; uncapped is explicit opt-in (the human footgun guard).

then.description: A control-plane product cannot fold into hosted-consumption platform meters; it must stay standalone to preserve the trust wall.
